description: A citizen is reporting graffiti on a public building.

nodes.task_description: Collect the location of the graffiti and a description.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately documents the location and nature of the graffiti.

nodes.task_description: Create a service request for the graffiti removal crew.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a work order.

nodes.task_description: Provide the citizen with a service request number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives the citizen a tracking number.
